title: Verilog compile hangs with XMR to function inside genblk

features.name: xmr_to_function_inside_named_genblk
features.description: Code should include a cross-module reference (XMR) to a function defined inside a named generate block

features.name: nested_genblk_with_function
features.description: Code should include nested generate blocks where an inner genblk contains a function accessed via XMR
